name: Transition payroll surface
description: Onboarded company with a biweekly pay schedule used by transition.spec.ts to drive the TransitionFlow UI. The fixture injects scenario.paySchedule.uuid into the page URL via localTestFixture's page.goto override, so the schedule decoration is load-bearing. Specs use hardcoded transition start/end dates from e2e/main.tsx — they don't rely on actual processed payroll history, so the previous 'history-1 with status=processed' decoration is removed. The runner could never satisfy that decoration anyway because the demo company is missing tax/W-4/SSN data, so the calculate step always 422'd with payroll_blocker:missing_forms and the runner skipped the rest of processPayroll.
